**Subject Line:**  
⚠️ Verify Your Account Details to Prevent Unauthorized Access

---

**Body:**

Dear [First Name],

We recently noticed unusual activity on your account and want to ensure the information we have on file is accurate and up-to-date. To protect your account and personal information, please verify your details by clicking the link below:

[Verify Account Details]

This is an important step to help prevent unauthorized access to your account. If you did not request this verification, please contact us immediately at [customer support email] or call us at [phone number].

Your account security is our priority. Thank you for your prompt attention to this matter.

Best regards,  
[Bank Name]  
Customer Support Team  
[Bank Website URL] | [Social Media Links] | [Phone Number]

---

**P.S.** If you're not able to click the link above, please copy and paste the following URL into your browser: [Verification Link]

---

**Note:** This is a simulated phishing email for training or awareness purposes. Always be cautious with unsolicited emails asking for personal or financial information. Verify the sender's authenticity before clicking any links.

Thank you for your prompt attention to this matter.

Best regards,

Customer Support Team  
[Bank Name]  
[Bank Website] | [Social Media Links]
